title: CVE-2026-33155 - DeepDiff has Memory Exhaustion DoS through SAFE_TO_IMPORT

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-33155 - DeepDiff has Memory Exhaustion DoS through 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/21
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*builtins.bytes*'
            - '*builtins.list*'
            - '*builtins.range*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
